scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-domain && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-db && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-api
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-domain && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-db && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-api && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-desktop
scripts.deploy:vm: echo Voir deploy/README.md — sur la VM : sudo bash deploy/install-vm.sh
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-db && npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-api && node apps/api/scripts/smoke-finance.mjs
scripts.test:domain: npm run build -w @tabernacle/erp-premium-domain && node --test scripts/test-closure.mjs scripts/test-alerts.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test:domain && npm run test:sync
